summary_raw: May 4 futures down on Iran conflict escalation. May 1: Nasdaq hit record 25,114, S&P 500 at 7,230. Apple earnings beat drove tech rally. Palantir earnings due. Seagate blowout quarter. US-Iran conflict driving oil surge and risk-off sentiment on May 4.
